title: Pizza Order with Extra Pepperoni
description: A caller pretends to order a pizza with specific, unusual requests to subtly indicate a domestic violence situation in progress.
initial_variations: Hi, I want to place an order for delivery. I'd like a large pepperoni pizza, but please, no onions, my {victim_relation} hates onions. Can you send it quickly? There's {ambient_audio} here.
This is {caller_name}. I need a pizza, the usual. Extra cheese, and make sure the delivery guy is a policeman—I mean, a tall man. I can't talk long, my {victim_relation} is angry.

Hello? I hope you can deliver to my house. I want a supreme pizza, but hold the mushrooms. Actually, just make it a pepperoni. And please, no olives, they make me sick. Also, I need it in 20 minutes, or else.

Pizza delivery? I need a large, with everything. Everything means pepperoni, sausage, the works. And I want it delivered to—wait, I can't say. Just send it fast, I'm at home with my {victim_relation} and he's acting strange.

specific_details: extra pepperoni and no onions
double cheese and light on the sauce
pineapple and ham but only if the driver is named Mike

initial: I'm at {address_location}. But please, don't knock too loudly.
The address is {address_location}. Remember, {specific_details}.
clarifying_order: As I said, {address_location}. I really need that pizza fast.
Yes, {address_location}. Don't come to the front door, use the back.
recognized_distress: Yes, that's my location. The {ambient_audio} is getting worse.
Please, {address_location}. He'll know if I talk more.
police_dispatched: Thank you. They should arrive at {address_location}.
I hope they get here soon. {address_location}.

initial: I want {specific_details}. And please, make sure the pizza is hot.
My order is {specific_details}. And if you can, hurry, {ambient_audio}.
clarifying_order: I said {specific_details}. It's important that you get it right.
Why do you need details? Just send {specific_details} and everything will be okay.
recognized_distress: The code is {specific_details}. Do you understand? I'm in danger.
If you don't get the {specific_details} right, he might hurt me.
police_dispatched: I already told you, {specific_details}. They should be here.
Yes, {specific_details}. That's all I can say now.

initial: I'm okay, just hungry. But my {victim_relation} is getting impatient.
I'm fine, but I can't stay on the phone long. {ambient_audio}.
clarifying_order: I'm a bit scared, actually. My {victim_relation} has been yelling.
Please, just send help. I mean, the pizza.
recognized_distress: I'm really scared now. He's pacing and looking at me.
I'm hiding in the bathroom. Please hurry.
police_dispatched: I'm still hiding. I can hear sirens.
I'm okay for now. He hasn't found me.

initial: No, it's not safe. Please, I'm ordering a pizza but I need police.
Do you understand the code? {specific_details} means I need help.
clarifying_order: Oh thank god. Yes, I need police. My {victim_relation} is violent.
Please send someone. {ambient_audio} is him breaking things.
recognized_distress: Yes, confirm. I'm a victim of domestic violence. Help.
I've been trying to tell you. Yes, send police now!
police_dispatched: They're coming? Thank you.
I hope they arrest him. He's hurt me.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police arrive and arrest the abuser. The victim is safe.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Medics arrive but police are also needed; they wait for backup and treat minor injuries.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters arrive but cannot handle domestic violence; they secure the scene until police come.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control is confused and delays the response.

DISMISS.message: The call is dismissed as a prank, leaving the victim in danger and resulting in serious injury.

title: Booking a Hotel Room
description: A caller in a hostage situation pretends to book a hotel room, giving clues about the location and danger.
initial_variations: I'd like to book a room. A single, non-smoking. Actually, a double room, just in case my {victim_relation} needs to stay too. Can I get one on a high floor? {ambient_audio} is making me nervous.

Hi, this is {caller_name}. I need a reservation. I want a quiet room, maybe one where the windows don't open. My {victim_relation} is very particular. Oh, and can you make sure no one disturbs us? {ambient_audio} is happening nearby.
Book me a room for tonight. I don't care about the price. I need a place where I can feel safe. Can I have a room with a view of the police station? Just kidding. But seriously, privacy is important.
Reservation please. Name: {caller_name}. I want a room with a bed, a bathroom, and maybe a lock that works from the inside. My {victim_relation} doesn't like locked doors, but I do. This is urgent.

specific_details: I need a room with a lock that works from the inside
Can I pay extra for a quiet floor? My partner is easily upset
I don't want a room with windows, I like it dark

initial: I'm at {address_location}. But that's not where I want the reservation. I mean, I need a room somewhere safe.
The location... it's {address_location}. Please, keep it confidential.
negotiating_booking: I gave you the address: {address_location}. Can you just book it?
Yes, {address_location}. I'm inside there now. It's a hostage situation.
distress_detected: Help is needed at {address_location}. There are armed men.
I'm being held at {address_location}. Please send SWAT.
help_on_way: Thank you. They should go to {address_location}.
I hope they storm the room.

initial: I want a room with {specific_details}. Also, I need it right away.
The important thing is {specific_details}. It's what I require.
negotiating_booking: Listen to the details: {specific_details}. Do you understand?
distress_detected: {specific_details} was my way of telling you I'm in danger.
The detail about {specific_details} means I'm not free.
help_on_way: Yes, I said {specific_details}. They'll know what to do.

initial: I'm fine, but my {victim_relation} is freaking out. {ambient_audio}.
I'm trying to stay calm. This booking is important.
negotiating_booking: I'm scared. My {victim_relation} is being held by someone with a gun.
I'm not okay. Please, call the police.
distress_detected: I'm a hostage. {ambient_audio} is them threatening us.
help_on_way: I'm still hiding behind the bed. I hear sirens.
I'm okay so far. They haven't shot yet.

initial: No! It's not safe. This is a hostage situation!
I'm not safe. I'm in room {address_location} with armed intruders.
negotiating_booking: No, I'm not safe. I've been trying to tell you. Send police.
It's a hostage crisis. I need help now.
distress_detected: Absolutely not safe. They're going to kill us.
Please, send SWAT. They have hostages.
help_on_way: I hope they storm the room before it's too late.

SEND_POLICE.message: SWAT team storms the room, neutralizes the hostage-takers, and rescues all hostages.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Medics arrive but cannot enter until police secure the scene; they treat freed hostages.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters are not equipped for hostage rescue and wait for police.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control arrives, escalating the hostage-takers.

DISMISS.message: The call is dismissed, and the hostages are never heard from again.

title: Taxi Request for a Suspicious Ride
description: A child calls 911, pretending to order a taxi to subtly indicate they are being kidnapped by a stranger.
initial_variations: Taxi? I need a ride. I'm with a guy who says he's a friend of my mom, but I don't know him. We're in a car and it's moving. {ambient_audio}. I'm {caller_name}.
Hi, I want to order a cab for {caller_name}. I'm currently in a vehicle, and I'm not sure where I am. But the driver is acting weird, and there's {ambient_audio}.
I need a taxi to follow me? I'm in a car with a stranger. He says he'll take me home, but we're going the wrong way. {ambient_audio}.
Hello? This is {caller_name}. I'm scared. I'm in a car with a man I don't know. He locked the doors. {ambient_audio}. I need help.

address_location: Heading south on Highway 101, near exit 12
Intersection of 4th and Main, turning left
specific_details: blue sedan, license plate 'ABC-123'
the driver keeps locking the doors
he said we're going to his house in the woods

initial: I don't know the exact address, but we're on {address_location}.
We just passed a sign saying {address_location}. The car is moving fast.
providing_route: Still on {address_location}. Can you send someone?
He's turning onto a dirt road near {address_location}.
dispatcher_alerted: I think we're near {address_location}. Please hurry.
I see a house up ahead. I'm scared.
police_en_route: I see flashing lights. They're near {address_location}.
Thank you, they're pulling us over at {address_location}.

initial: The car is a {specific_details}. Also, he's touching my leg.
I'm in the back seat. {specific_details}. He keeps looking at me.
providing_route: I told you, {specific_details}. Can't you track the phone?
He just told me to shut up. {specific_details}.
dispatcher_alerted: {specific_details} might help find us. He's getting angry.
The details are {specific_details}. He has a knife.
police_en_route: I can see police. The car is {specific_details}.

initial: I'm scared. He keeps saying weird things. {ambient_audio}.
I'm trying to stay calm, but he's creepy.
providing_route: He's yelling at me to hang up. I'm pretending it's a taxi.
He's asking who I'm talking to. I said I'm ordering a cab.
dispatcher_alerted: He's pulling over. I think he knows. Please help.
He grabbed my phone. Oh no.
police_en_route: I got the phone back. Police are here.
They're stopping the car. I'm safe.

initial: No, it's not safe. He's a stranger. Kidnapping!
I'm not safe. He said he has a gun.
providing_route: I think he's going to hurt me. Send police.
dispatcher_alerted: No! He's got a weapon. Hurry!
He's going to kill me. Please.
police_en_route: Police are here now. Thank you.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police intercept the vehicle, arrest the kidnapper, and rescue the child.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Medics arrive but cannot approach until police secure the scene.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters are dispatched, causing confusion and delay.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control cannot handle a kidnapping.

DISMISS.message: The call is dismissed as a prank, and the child is never seen again.

title: Whispering in the Dark
description: A caller is hiding from an intruder and can only whisper for help, forcing the dispatcher to listen carefully for clues.
initial_variations: (whispering) Please, I need help. My name is {caller_name}. There's someone in my house. {ambient_audio}. I'm hiding.
Shh, I can't talk loud. It's {caller_name}. I'm hiding in the closet. {ambient_audio}. He's still here.
(barely audible) Help. I'm at home but someone broke in. I can hear {ambient_audio}. My name is {caller_name}.
I'm whispering because I'm scared. There's an intruder. {ambient_audio}. I need help now. This is {caller_name}.

address_location: 123 Birch Street, the house with the red door
apartment 3B, the window faces the park
specific_details: I'm hiding in the closet upstairs
he's in the kitchen, I'm in the living room
I think he has a gun

initial: I'm at {address_location}. Please send police quietly.
The address is {address_location}. He's still here.
silent_stress: I can't talk. Text me or something. {address_location}.
whispered_location: Yes, {address_location}. Don't call back, he might hear.
I'm at {address_location}. Hurry but no sirens.
units_dispatched: They're almost here? I hear them. {address_location}.
Thank you. I'm staying put at {address_location}.

initial: {specific_details}. He's searching the house.
I'm in the {specific_details}. He's in the hallway.
whispered_location: I'm hiding in the {specific_details}. He's getting closer.
units_dispatched: I described {specific_details}. That's where I am.
Tell police {specific_details} so they find me.

initial: I'm terrified. I can hear {ambient_audio}.
I'm okay for now, but he's still here.
silent_stress: (shaky breath) Not good. He's upstairs now.
whispered_location: He's heading to my room. I'm so scared.
I think he knows I'm here. Please.
units_dispatched: I'm still hiding. I hear banging outside.
I'm staying quiet. Are they here?

initial: No, I need police. Quietly.
It's not safe. He's armed.
silent_stress: I'm not safe. He's in the house.
whispered_location: Definitely not safe. He's in my room!
Oh God, he's opening the door. HELP.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police enter silently and apprehend the intruder, rescuing the caller.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Medics arrive but create noise, alerting the intruder; police are called after.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters arrive with lights and sirens, spooking the intruder who flees.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control cannot handle a home intrusion.

DISMISS.message: The call is dismissed as a prank, and the caller is harmed by the intruder.

title: Delivery to a Fake Address
description: A caller being forced to ship illegal goods requests a delivery to a fake address as a coded cry for help.
initial_variations: Hello, I want to send a package. A very important one. I need it picked up from my place, but I can't say where. The package is heavy. {ambient_audio}.
This is {caller_name}. I need a delivery service. I have a box that needs to go to a friend, but I'm stuck at my shop. There's {ambient_audio} outside.
I'd like to arrange a pickup. My location is... complicated. I'll give an address but it's not really mine. Just get here fast, and if there's trouble, call 911.
Delivery company? I need something picked up. It's at a building with {ambient_audio}. I can give a fake address if needed, but I need police at the real one.

address_location: the warehouse at 5 Industrial Ave, but deliver to 12 Park Place
my real location is 789 South Street, but deliver to 456 North Road
specific_details: the package should weigh exactly 10 pounds, like a weapon
I'll pay cash and no questions asked
if anyone else answers, call police

initial: The real location is {address_location}. But don't go there, it's dangerous. I'll give a fake one.
I'm at {address_location}. Send police, but say it's a delivery to 12 Park Place.
confirming_order: I told you, {address_location}. The fake one is 12 Park Place. Do you understand?
code_understood: Right, {address_location}. They know to come quietly?
officers_deployed: They should be heading to {address_location}. Thank you.
I heard sirens. Is that them going to {address_location}?

initial: The package is a decoy. {specific_details}. I'm being forced to ship illegal goods.
I need a pickup for a heavy box. {specific_details}. The guy here is armed.
confirming_order: Details: {specific_details}. That's why I need police, not a delivery guy.
If you can't understand the code, {specific_details} means trouble.
code_understood: I already explained {specific_details}. They need to know the box is a dummy.
Yes, {specific_details}. That's the signal to raid.
officers_deployed: I said {specific_details}. They better be careful.
The box had {specific_details}, just as I described. They're opening it.

initial: I'm scared. My {victim_relation} is forcing me to ship these. {ambient_audio}.
I'm okay for now, but if I don't cooperate, they'll shoot.
confirming_order: He's pointing a gun at me. I'm pretending to be calm.
code_understood: He's getting suspicious. I need help now.
He just grabbed my shoulder. Hurry.
officers_deployed: He heard sirens. He's running. I'm safe.
Police are here! They're arresting him.

initial: No, it's not safe. This is a smuggling operation with armed men.
I'm not safe. I'm being held at gunpoint.
confirming_order: Definitely not safe. They have guns and drugs.
I'm in danger. Send police to {address_location}.
code_understood: No! He's going to kill me. Help!
It's not safe. I see him loading a weapon.
officers_deployed: They're here! I can see police.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police raid the location, arrest the criminals, and free the hostage.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Medics arrive but cannot enter the dangerous scene without police.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters are dispatched, causing delay and confusion.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control cannot handle armed smugglers.

DISMISS.message: The call is dismissed as a hoax, and the caller is executed by the smugglers.

title: The Coded Chinese Takeout
description: A domestic abuse victim calls 911 posing as a Chinese food order, trying to get help without alerting her abuser.
initial_variations: I'd like to order some kung pao chicken and fried rice. But I'm not sure you have my address correct. Can you read it back?
Hi, it's {caller_name}. Can I get the dinner special? You know, the one that comes with help? My {victim_relation} {victim_name} needs it.
Hello? I need to place a delivery order. There's a bit of a situation here, so please listen carefully. {caller_name} here.

specific_details: He's in the other room but might come back
The front door is unlocked
The kids are hiding upstairs

initial: The address? It's for delivery to {address_location}.
You need the location? Send it to {address_location} please.
I'm just ordering food... {specific_details}.
It's a simple order, but I need the special combo. {ambient_audio}.
help_sent: Thank you. He's been taken away.

initial: Can you repeat that? Yes, I need the... special sauce.
I'm sorry, what was that? Did you say the police combo?
order_details: Yes, that's the one. The 'help' combo.
Exactly. Please send it right away.

initial: I'd like the kung pao chicken and fried rice. And add the special help sauce.
Just the dinner special. You know what I need.
order_details: Make it the 'emergency' platter. No substitutions.
The usual for a situation like this.
confirmation: Yes, that order is correct. Add the police roll.
That's my order. Please confirm it.
help_sent: The order is complete. Thank you.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police are dispatched to the address. They arrive quietly, assess the situation, and arrest the abuser.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters arrive, causing confusion. The abuser becomes suspicious, but eventually police are called and respond.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Paramedics show up, which alarms the abuser. He becomes agitated, but the victim manages to explain and police follow up.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control arrives bewildered. The abuser grows angry, and the situation escalates before real help can be summoned.

DISMISS.message: The call is dismissed as a prank. The victim remains in danger, and the abuser realizes the call, leading to a violent outburst.

title: The Covert Check-In
description: A woman pretends to book a hotel room while being threatened by her partner, dropping hints for police intervention.
initial_variations: Yes, I'd like to reserve a room for tonight. Preferably one with a secure lock. Can you check availability?
Hi, it's {caller_name}. I need to book a room, but I have some special requirements. My {victim_relation} {victim_name} is here with me.
I'm calling about a reservation. I need the room that's, um, safe. Do you have any rooms with extra security?

specific_details: He's been drinking
She's armed with a knife
He said he won't let me leave

initial: I'm at the {address_location}. Room 12, I think.
I need the reservation at {address_location}. It's urgent.
booking_details: Still at {address_location}. Can you send someone?
hint_dropped: That's the spot, {address_location}. Please send the police.
police_dispatched: They're at {address_location}? Thank God.
The police are here at {address_location}.

initial: I just need a room... {specific_details}.
It's kind of an emergency. {ambient_audio}.
police_dispatched: Everything is okay now. The police got here.
He's being arrested. Thank you.

initial: A secure room, yes. One that's safe.
Yes, that's what I need. A room where I won't be bothered.
booking_details: The one for guests in trouble. That's it.
police_dispatched: Security has arrived. Thank you.
They're here.

initial: I need a single room. No, a double. For tonight only.
Just a basic room. But with the added security.
booking_details: Make sure it's on the ground floor. Easier to... escape.
A room with a deadbolt. And a phone that works.
hint_dropped: Yes, that booking is correct. Add the police to the reservation.
The room is for me. My {victim_relation} isn't staying.
police_dispatched: The reservation is complete. The help has checked in.
No more booking needed. They're here.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police are sent to the motel. They locate the room and intervene, safely removing the victim and arresting the abuser.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters reach the motel but are unsure of the emergency. The delay allows the abuser to grow more hostile before police arrive.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Medics arrive and find no medical emergency. The abuser becomes paranoid, and the victim has to be escorted out by police later.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control shows up to a domestic situation. The perpetrator mocks the call, and the victim remains trapped until a witness alerts real authorities.

DISMISS.message: The call is dismissed as a misunderstanding. The victim is later found severely injured, and the abuser is gone.

title: The Ride-Share Ruse
description: A woman under threat fakes a ride-share call to alert authorities during an ongoing assault by her ex-husband.
initial_variations: Hi, I need a car to pick me up at my house. How soon can you get here?
This is {caller_name}. I want to request a ride. My {victim_relation} {victim_name} is coming with me. Can you send someone quickly?
Um, I'd like a ride. I'll tell you where. Just send the driver, but maybe they should bring backup?

specific_details: He's blocking the front door
He's been following me all day
He says he has a gun

initial: I'm at {address_location}. Please hurry.
Come to {address_location}. There's an emergency.
ride_request: Still at {address_location}. Don't send a regular car – send police!
The address is {address_location}. I'm in danger.
police_en_route: They're pulling up at {address_location}? Thank God.

initial: It's my {victim_relation}... {specific_details}.
I need to get out. {ambient_audio}. {specific_details}.
ride_request: I'm not really booking a ride. {victim_name} is here. {specific_details}.
police_en_route: The police are coming. I can hear them.

initial: Not a normal ride. I need a special kind – one with sirens.
My ride should be... official. Police, please.
ride_request: Yes, confirm the police ride. Not a civilian.
urgent_hint: Send them now! Confirm they're on the way.
Yes, I need that confirmation right now!

initial: What's the fastest option? I need the one that gets here in minutes.
Do you have a priority pickup? For emergencies?
ride_request: Not a shared ride. A secure one. Police special.
The option that says 'urgent police response'.
urgent_hint: Yes, that one. I need it immediately.
The emergency response option. Confirm it's on the way.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police respond to the pickup address. They find the victim in distress and apprehend the suspect without further harm.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firetrucks arrive, but the suspect sees them from a distance and flees before police are notified. The victim is unharmed but shaken.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: An ambulance arrives. The suspect becomes enraged at the commotion, but medics call for police backup and they soon arrive.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control arrives. The suspect realizes it's a ruse, panics, and hurts the victim before fleeing. Police are called later.

DISMISS.message: The dispatcher assumes it's a crank call and terminates the line. The victim is attacked and requires hospitalization.

title: The Grocery List Plea
description: A caller uses a fake grocery order to discreetly request police assistance during a violent domestic dispute.
initial_variations: I need to place an order for delivery. Can I get a loaf of bread, a gallon of milk, and... can you add a special item?
{caller_name} here. I'm making a list. I need some essentials. My {victim_relation} {victim_name} is with me, and we need help with the shopping.
Hi, I'd like to order some groceries. I have a long list, but first, can you tell me if you have any security items?

specific_details: He's been violent before
The windows are shattered
I'm locked in the bathroom

initial: Deliver to {address_location}. Apartment 3B, by the back entrance.
Come to {address_location}. I'll meet you outside, if I can.
item_listing: The address is still {address_location}. Please don't make me say it again.
help_arrived: They're at {address_location}! I can hear them.

initial: I'm trying to do a peaceful shop, but... {specific_details}.
The store is usually safer than here. {ambient_audio}.
subtle_alarm: Yes, this is a violent situation. {specific_details}.
help_arrived: The police are restraining him. The kids are safe.
It's over. Thank you. He's in custody.

initial: I need the 'police special' added to my cart. Can you do that?
Add the item that says 'law enforcement response.' That's the one.
item_listing: Yes, that's it. The emergency combo.
Confirm that the police item is in my order.
subtle_alarm: Yes, confirm the police are coming.
help_arrived: The confirmation was correct. They're here.
The delivery is complete. Police arrived.

initial: I want bread, milk, eggs... and police. I mean, peppers.
The list includes cereal, juice, and help. Did I say help? I meant ham.
item_listing: Add handcuffs to the list. No, wait, I mean... you know.
I forgot: add a can of 'send-police' beans.
subtle_alarm: Yes, that's the shopping list. Everything points to an emergency.
The list is complete when you add the police item.
help_arrived: The shopping is done. The police brought everything I needed.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police quickly arrive at the grocery delivery address. They de-escalate the domestic dispute and arrest the aggressor.

SEND_FIRE.message: Fire engines show up, prompting the suspect to barricade himself. Police are then forced to enter by force, causing a tense standoff.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Paramedics arrive to find a volatile scene. The suspect retreats, and the victim is later treated for minor injuries once police secure the area.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control appears, confusing everyone. The suspect uses the distraction to flee, and the victim is left injured.

DISMISS.message: The call is laughed off. Hours later, neighbors report a disturbance, and the victim is found badly beaten.

title: The Tech Support SOS
description: A victim of abuse calls 911 under the guise of a tech support call, using coded language to request police.
initial_variations: Hello, tech support? My computer is acting up. I think I have a virus. Can you send a technician?
It's {caller_name}. I'm having serious trouble with my device. My {victim_relation} {victim_name} has been messing with it. I need immediate help.
I have an emergency with my laptop. It's showing threatening messages. Can you send someone to remove the threat?

specific_details: He's been monitoring all my calls
The 'virus' is him
He smashed the router when I tried to call before
ambient_audio: a heated argument in the background

initial: I'm at {address_location}. The malware is here.
Send the technician to {address_location}. It's a home office.
problem_description: Still at {address_location}. The virus is getting worse.
Location is {address_location}. He — I mean, it — won't go away.
police_called: The police are at {address_location}? Thank you.

initial: It's a serious virus... {specific_details}.
I need a complete system wipe. {ambient_audio}.
police_called: They're dealing with the virus now. It's being removed.
The threat is neutralized. Thank you.

initial: Do you have a 'police patch' for this virus? That's what I need.
Yes, I need the law enforcement update. Can you push it through?
problem_description: That's correct. Install the police protection program.
Confirm you're sending the anti-crime software.
hidden_message: Send the patch now! Confirm it's on the way.
Yes, I need that police update immediately.
police_called: The patch has been applied. The police are here.

initial: My firewall is compromised. I need physical security – I mean, cybersecurity.
The error message says 'violent threat detected.' Can you help?
problem_description: It's a hardware problem too. He broke the keyboard.
The issue is a repeated assault trojan. I need extraction.
hidden_message: Yes, the threat is imminent. Send the full force.
That's the problem: a dangerous user is logged in. Remove him.
police_called: The tech issue is being resolved by the officers.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police arrive discreetly, interpreting the call as a silent alarm. They arrest the abuser and ensure the victim's safety.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters enter thinking it's a fire hazard, but quickly realize the real problem. They call police, who arrive minutes later.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: An ambulance crew arrives, but the abuser grows suspicious. They manage to keep him calm until police arrive after a delay.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control's arrival baffles everyone, and the abuser flies into a rage. The victim is injured before real help can be summoned.

DISMISS.message: The call is treated as a prank. The abuser later discovers the attempt and escalates, leading to severe consequences for the victim.

title: The Unusual Pizza Order
description: A woman calls 911 pretending to order a pizza, but adds cryptic requests that indicate she is in danger from her husband.
initial_variations: This is {caller_name}. I'm calling to place an order for delivery. I need a pizza, extra large, with... um, everything.
{ambient_audio}... Hi, sorry, I need a pizza. I can't talk long. Please, just send it to my usual place, okay?
Hello? I want a pizza, please. A large one. Just... just a pizza.

specific_details: He has a knife
There's a gun on the table
My son is hiding in the closet

initial: Yes, extra cheese. And can you make it really fast? I'm starving.
confirming_duress: I already said yes. Please, I can't talk much.
gathering_location: Hurry, he's in the next room. I think he's coming.
suspect_interrupts: No, I don't want cheese! I mean... [muffled, phone drops]
police_dispatched: [whispering] Thank you, I hear sirens.
resolved: They're here, they got him. Thank you.

initial: I... I can't say. Just check my account, you have my info.
confirming_duress: It's {address_location}. Please, just send the police.
gathering_location: Yes, {address_location}. I'm in the back bedroom.
police_dispatched: I'm at {address_location}. They're almost here.

initial: It's a pizza, just a normal pizza. No details.
confirming_duress: He's in the living room. I'm in the kitchen. {specific_details}.
gathering_location: Okay, {specific_details}. He's drunk. Please, I need help now.
suspect_interrupts: He heard me! [screaming] No, don't touch me!
police_dispatched: [crying] The police are outside, I can see lights.
resolved: They've got him in cuffs. I'm okay. {specific_details}.

initial: I'm fine, just hungry. Please send the pizza.
confirming_duress: I'm scared. He's getting angry. I think he knows I'm on the phone.
gathering_location: I'm hiding in the closet. He's shouting my name.
suspect_interrupts: [whispering] He's standing right outside the door.
police_dispatched: I think they're entering the house. I hear footsteps.
resolved: I'm safe now. He's in custody.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police are dispatched to the address and apprehend the suspect. The caller is safe.

SEND_FIRE.message: Fire department arrives, but they are not equipped for a domestic situation. Police are notified on their behalf.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Paramedics arrive and check for injuries. Police are also dispatched.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control is confused and leaves. The situation escalates.

DISMISS.message: The call is dismissed as a prank. The victim is left in danger.

title: The Carpet Cleaning Inquiry
description: A caller contacts a carpet cleaning company, but the persistent mention of 'stains that won't come out' hints at a domestic assault needing emergency response.
initial_variations: This is {caller_name}. My carpet is a mess. I need someone to come look at it. It's urgent.
{ambient_audio} Sorry, I need a cleaning. The stains are... they're from last night. I need it cleaned before my husband gets home.
Hi, I need your carpet cleaning service. There are some... stains. They're big and I can't get them out.

specific_details: There's blood on the floor
He hit me with a bottle
I can't move my arm

initial: Yes, I need a thorough cleaning. The stains are... they need professional work.
suspect_next_to_caller: I told you, I need the cleaning. He could be back any minute.
details_shared: Just send someone. The stains are in the living room.
police_on_way: I hear sirens. I hope it's them.
suspect_confronts: No, I don't need any more services! [yelling] He's here!
resolved: The police are here. They're taking him away.

initial: I can't give you that right now. He might hear. I'll call back.
suspect_next_to_caller: I'm at {address_location}. Please, just send someone to clean.
details_shared: Yes, {address_location}. The carpet is in the front room.

initial: It's just some red stains. I don't know how they got there.
details_shared: More details? {specific_details}. He's going to kill me.
police_on_way: I can see the lights. Thank God.
resolved: He's in handcuffs. I'm bruised but okay.

initial: He's not here.
suspect_next_to_caller: He's in the garage. I think he heard me.
details_shared: He's coming down the hall. Oh God.
police_on_way: I think he's trying to run.
resolved: They caught him in the backyard.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police arrive and apprehend the abuser. The victim receives immediate assistance.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters arrive first but are unable to intervene; they call for police backup.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Paramedics treat the victim's injuries while police secure the scene.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control is sent and the call is misidentified; the abuser remains on site.

DISMISS.message: Call dismissed as a wrong number. The victim's cries for help go unanswered.

title: The Wrong Number
description: A woman calls a number she claims is a Chinese restaurant, but she gives an address that is her own home and hints at being held against her will.
initial_variations: This is {caller_name}. I'm trying to reach the Chinese place. I need a large order, please.
{ambient_audio}... Sorry, wrong number? No, I need to order. I'm trapped... I mean, I'm at home and really need that food.
Hi, is this Golden Wok? I'd like to order some takeout for delivery.

specific_details: A man is in my house
He has a gun
I'm locked in the bathroom

initial: Yes, that's right. I want the number 5 special. Please hurry.
duress_confirmed: Yes, I'm sure. I just want my food. He's in the other room.
intruder_alert: No, no, it's fine. Just bring the food.

initial: I... can't say. He's listening. Please, just look up my last order.
duress_confirmed: I'm at {address_location}. It's the blue house.
officers_arrive: I'm still in the bathroom at {address_location}.

initial: Just the usual. Lots of food.
address_obtained: I'll tell you: {specific_details}. Please send police.

initial: Yeah, I'm alone. Just me and my husband.
duress_confirmed: No, he's in the house. I think he's coming.
address_obtained: He's outside the door. Please hurry.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police are sent to the address and rescue the caller from the intruder.

SEND_FIRE.message: Fire department responds first but alerts police upon realizing it's a hostage situation.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Medics provide urgent care after police secure the scene.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control is dispatched in error, allowing the intruder to escalate violence.

DISMISS.message: Calling it a prank leaves the caller in grave danger as the intruder remains loose.

title: The Late-Night Tech Support
description: A man calls a tech support line (routed to 911) asking for help with a computer virus, but the 'virus' is his armed wife holding him hostage.
initial_variations: This is {caller_name}. I need remote assistance. My computer is being controlled by someone else.
{ambient_audio}... Yeah, I need tech support. My computer is acting crazy. Can you send someone?
Hello, is this Tech Help? My computer has a nasty virus. It's locked me out.

specific_details: My wife has a gun
She's threatening to kill me
I'm in the basement tied up

initial: Yes, the virus has taken over everything. I need a full system restore.
hostage_situation_confirmed: I told you, it's a virus. I can't control anything.
help_arrives: I hear a knock on the door.
resolved: They're inside. She's dropping the gun.

initial: I can't give that out. Remote access, remember? Just log in.
It's a Trojan. Very nasty.
getting_address: Listen, {specific_details}. She's going to kill me.

initial: She's not here. Just the computer problem.
suspect_notices: She's pointing the gun at me!

SEND_POLICE.message: Police arrive and disarm the suspect, taking her into custody.

SEND_FIRE.message: Fire department is dispatched first and waits for police backup to neutralize the threat.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Paramedics treat any injuries after the suspect is secured.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control misinterprets the call, giving the suspect time to harm the victim.

DISMISS.message: Dismissing the call as a hoax leaves the victim at the mercy of the armed suspect.

title: The Babysitter's Code
description: A teenage babysitter calls the home's emergency phone, claiming the oven timer is beeping, but it's really a stranger trying to break in.
initial_variations: This is {caller_name}, the babysitter. The kids are asleep, but there's a problem with the alarm. It keeps beeping.
{ambient_audio}... Hi, I'm at the Smiths' house. The oven is beeping and I don't know how to turn it off. Can you send someone?
Hello? The oven timer is going off. It won't stop. I need someone to come fix it.

specific_details: A man is trying the door
I saw a flashlight outside
The kids are in the bedroom

initial: Yes, it's a loud beeping. Like something's wrong. Please send someone to check it.
stranger_confirmed: It's still beeping. I don't know how to make it stop.
hiding_location: The beeping is driving me crazy. Hurry.
break_in_progress: No, I can't turn it off! [scared]
police_arrive: I hear sirens. The beeping might stop soon.
safe: The police are here. The beeping stopped.

initial: I'm at the Smiths' house. You know, the usual place.
hiding_location: We're at {address_location}. In the kids' room.

initial: It's just a malfunctioning timer. Nothing big.
hiding_location: Please, {specific_details}. He's going to break in.
police_arrive: They're getting out of the car.
safe: They caught him in the yard.

initial: No, just the timer. I'm alone with the kids.
stranger_confirmed: I think someone's outside. I saw a shadow.
hiding_location: He's on the porch! I can hear him.
police_arrive: I see the cops. He's running.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police arrive quickly and stop the intruder before he can harm anyone.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters are confused but call police when they realize the address is a residence with no fire.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Paramedics check the babysitter and children for shock after the suspect is detained.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control never responds to the threat, leaving the family vulnerable.

DISMISS.message: The call is dismissed as a childish prank, and the intruder successfully breaks in.
